name: karpathy
description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's four LLM-coding principles as coding-agent skills. Audit agent instruction files and review code diffs for scope creep, drive-by refactors, unexplained deletions, over-engineering, and missing verification.

interface.shortDescription: Audit agent instructions and review diffs against Karpathy principles.
interface.longDescription: Use Karpathy to audit CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and other agent instruction files, then review code changes for scope creep, drive-by refactors, unexplained deletions, over-engineering, and missing verification. The plugin reports first and applies fixes only after approval.
defaultPrompt: Review my changes before I commit.
Audit this AGENTS.md for agent guidance.
Check whether this diff stayed surgical.
